66 Rectification of Birth Time
Table VII
ln Tables 11, and N (B) we have followed Sri Rajagopala
lyyer's method; according to this divide the birth Vighatis by
sixty three. Add one to the remainder and count it from
Dhanishtha, Mrigasira and Chitra. For those who are inter
ested in this method, we give the remainder Vighatis and the
corresponding nakshatras. The count is from Dhanishtha,
Mrigasira, and Chitra. But to avoid confusion we are number
ing them from Asvini.
Vighatis Nakshatras
1,10,19,28,37,46,55 9,18,27
2,11,20,29,38,47,56 4,13,22
3,12,21 ,30,39,48,57 8,17,26
4, 13,22,31 ,40,49,58 3,12,21
